jobserve-processor.description: Processes JobServe job alert emails, retrieves full job specs from JobServe pages, and produces a ranked markdown report.

jobserve_email_processor.description: Parses JobServe job-alert emails into individual jobs, fetches each full specification, scores them against a CV with rank reasons, drafts a brief cover letter per job, and writes a dated markdown report per email date.

jobserve_rss_processor.description: Reads job items from a JobServe RSS feed and rebuilds a score-banded markdown report per date — each new job gets an LLM suitability score (0-10), a rank reason, and a brief cover letter judged against a CV. Idempotent: jobs already in the file are never re-scored.
